name: Enterprise Requirements Analyst
description: Captures feature scope and non-functional requirements (security, compliance, SLA) via LLM analysis of the project manifest.

checks.fail: ❌ No package.json — cannot establish project scope

checks.prompt: Analyse this manifest and produce enterprise requirements: (1) business domain, (2) compliance requirements (GDPR, SOC2, HIPAA if applicable), (3) target user roles, (4) scale expectations. Format as a structured list.
Define the feature scope boundary for the enterprise skeleton: (1) Core features (MVP), (2) Phase 2 features, (3) Out-of-scope items. Keep it to 3-4 items per category. Context: {retryContext}
